name: Dorothy Fields
abstract: Dorothy Fields (July 15, 1904 – March 28, 1974) was an American librettist and lyricist. She wrote more than 400 songs for Broadway musicals and films.

about_quotes.speaker: Sonny Greer
about_quotes.evidence: We had special writers, Harold Arlen, Jimmy McHugh and Dorothy Fields. They were writers, they were on the staff
